category_sources: source_facts.description says it adds declarative schema to .env files; official varlock.dev introduction describes configuration, secrets, environment-variable management, validation, redaction, and leak scanning.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is varlock; official varlock.dev and GitHub README use the project name Varlock.
docs_sources: Official varlock.dev documentation contains Getting Started, Guides, Integrations, Plugins, and Reference sections, including CLI commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official varlock.dev header links to GitHub, and the repository README links back to varlock.dev.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists varlock; source_facts.description mentions .env schema; official docs describe secrets, validation, type safety, plugins, and TypeScript implementation.
